name: The Thinning
descriptionSeed: A settlement where the veil is thin enough to feel and the residents have stopped finding that remarkable. Buildings here are provisional — the Numinous find permanent architecture a slightly embarrassing attachment. People are kind, dreamy, and prone to stopping mid-sentence because something more interesting than you is happening adjacent to reality. The waygate here needed no making — the place was already thin, and someone long ago simply named where the thinness opened. It is the only gate in the network that predates its own discovery.
encounterFlavor: Numinous who are gentle and not entirely present; a visitor having their first genuine numinous experience and coming apart a little; something on the other side that has noticed you.
questSeeds: Someone crossed over and came back WRONG, and the Numinous will not call it wrong
The veil is thinning further, and it is not the Numinous doing it
